hooks.command: python3 -c "import sys,json; d=json.load(sys.stdin); fp=d.get('tool_input',{}).get('file_path',''); print('CONSISTENCY REMINDER: ' + fp + ' edited — check doc/*.tex, workflow .md files, and paper/main.tex for references that need updating (CLAUDE.md consistency rule).') if any(fp.endswith(e) for e in ['.py','.stan']) else (print('LATEX REMINDER: ' + fp + ' edited — run mcp__latex-server__validate_latex.') if fp.endswith('.tex') else None)"
